Claude Mythos Preview Analysis Pack

A research-oriented repository for studying Anthropic's Claude Mythos Preview System Card dated 2026-04-07. The project includes bilingual analysis reports, whitepaper-style editions in Chinese and English, extracted figure pages, and rendered HTML/PDF deliverables.

Quick Access

Edition Markdown HTML PDF Primary use
Executive summary bilingual html pdf Fast orientation
Deep report zh-CN html pdf Full explanatory reading
Deep report English html pdf External sharing / English readership
Whitepaper edition zh-CN html pdf Research, review, and policy discussion
Whitepaper edition English html pdf Research, review, and policy discussion

Repository Scope

  • A section-by-section reading of the full system card
  • A clear split between evidence, interpretation, and speculation
  • Plain-language explanations for frontier-AI safety terminology
  • Many examples and analogies for difficult concepts
  • Whitepaper-style syntheses for research and internal briefings
  • Rendered HTML/PDF editions in dist

Suggested Reading Path

  1. Start with the executive summary.
  2. Continue to the Chinese deep report.
  3. Use the Chinese whitepaper edition for a more academic synthesis.
  4. Share the English deep report when an English-facing version is needed.
  5. Use the English whitepaper edition for English-language review and policy discussion.

Visual Extracts

Selected figure pages extracted from the source PDF are stored in reports/assets:

Figure page Asset Notes
p.42 eci_capability_trajectory-042.png ECI capability trajectory discussion
p.50 firefox_exploit_results-050.png Firefox exploit task results
p.78 alignment_audit_scores-078.png Alignment audit comparison chart
p.150 welfare_metrics-150.png Automated welfare-related audit metrics

Document Provenance

  • Primary analyzed document: Claude Mythos Preview System Card
  • Document date shown inside the PDF: 2026-04-07
  • Public circulation reference: Ben Cherny on X
  • Archival note: the original PDF and extracted raw text were used locally for analysis and are intentionally not committed to this repository

Regenerating Rendered Outputs

Rendered outputs are generated with pandoc and headless Chrome.

./scripts/export_reports.sh
